metricsDriven: Architected a high-throughput order-processing microservice handling 50,000 requests/min on Azure Service Bus. Reduced end-to-end latency by 74% (820 ms to 210 ms) through Redis caching and targeted query optimisation. Mentored 4 junior engineers, cutting team PR review cycle time by 30%.

Designed RESTful APIs serving 200,000 monthly active users across 3 client applications and a mobile app. Migrated legacy monolith to 6 independent ASP.NET Core services, reducing deployment lead time by 93% from 3 days to 45 minutes via GitHub Actions pipelines. Maintained 99.95% uptime across all services over 18 months.

Spearheaded migration of monolithic e-commerce platform to 12 bounded microservices, improving checkout conversion by 8% through optimised query plans. Reduced cloud infrastructure spend by 31% via Spot VM adoption and right-sizing. Increased release frequency from monthly to daily deployments.

Developed a data-ingestion pipeline processing 500 GB of clickstream data daily using Apache Kafka and Azure Data Factory. Reduced pipeline failure rate from 12% to under 0.5% by implementing idempotent consumers and dead-letter queuing. Delivered weekly performance dashboards adopted by 4 product teams.

Rebuilt the reporting engine using CQRS and event sourcing, improving report generation time by 93% from 45 seconds to under 3 seconds at the 95th percentile. Enabled point-in-time state reconstruction required for GDPR compliance. Eliminated all 12 weekly deadline escalations within the first month.

Implemented CI/CD platform with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD, reducing average release cycle from 2 weeks to same-day deployments for 8 engineering teams. Cut environment setup time by 95% from 4 hours to 12 minutes via Terraform infrastructure-as-code. Eliminated 100% of manual provisioning errors.

Owned payment-gateway integration processing over 2 million USD in monthly transactions across 4 currencies and 3 providers. Reduced payment failure rate by 75% from 3.2% to 0.8% through robust retry logic and provider fallback routing. Maintained full PCI-DSS compliance with zero security incidents over 24 months.

Led delivery of a Progressive Web App replacing native iOS and Android apps, reducing maintenance overhead by 60%. Achieved a Lighthouse performance score of 97 with first contentful paint under 1.2 seconds on 4G. Coordinated rollout across 30 regional markets with zero critical post-launch incidents.

Introduced automated load and chaos testing with k6, uncovering 7 latent reliability issues before production. Reduced mean time to detect outages from 18 minutes to under 2 minutes via Grafana SLO dashboards. Improved error-budget burn rate by 65%, directly contributing to a 0.3% increase in annual SLA attainment.

Optimised a high-traffic SQL Server database serving 5,000 concurrent users through index redesign, table partitioning, and elimination of N+1 query patterns. Reduced average query execution time by 68% and eliminated weekly deadlock escalations. Published a query-optimisation runbook adopted as the database chapter of the team engineering handbook.

Designed a GraphQL API unifying 5 disparate REST services into a single developer-friendly schema, reducing client round trips by 60%. Improved perceived page load speed by 25% and cut new-team onboarding time from 3 days to 4 hours via comprehensive schema documentation. Served 400,000 requests daily at p99 latency of 85 ms.

Built identity platform supporting SSO for 40 enterprise clients using ASP.NET Core Identity and OpenID Connect. Implemented fine-grained RBAC that reduced unauthorised access incidents to zero over 24 months. Authored 6 partner integration guides, reducing client onboarding time from 5 days to 1 day.

Built a self-service internal developer platform enabling fully configured cloud environment provisioning in under 5 minutes. Reduced infra-request ticket volume by 80%, freeing the platform team to focus on reliability. Received the Engineering Excellence award at the company-wide tech summit, attended by 200+ engineers.

Led real-time notification platform processing 2 million events per day using Azure Event Hubs and SignalR. Reduced critical bug escape rate by 45% through mandatory integration-test gates in CI. Defined coding and testing standards that were adopted by 3 product teams comprising 18 engineers.

Built and maintained a React and .NET 9 SaaS dashboard serving 1,200 enterprise clients worldwide. Reduced initial JavaScript bundle size by 42% via component-level lazy loading. Redesigned the onboarding flow with the UX team, increasing the 7-day activation rate from 54% to 73%.
technical: Architected and delivered an order-processing microservice using Azure Service Bus, Redis, and ASP.NET Core Minimal APIs. Implemented the CQRS pattern with MediatR, clean architecture layering, and xUnit test coverage exceeding 90%. Integrated OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing across the full service mesh.

Migrated a legacy monolith to six independent microservices communicating via gRPC and RabbitMQ. Configured GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines with automated integration tests and Helm-based Kubernetes deployments.

Built a full-stack SaaS dashboard using React, TypeScript, and .NET 9 with Entity Framework Core and PostgreSQL. Implemented real-time updates via SignalR and server-state management with React Query and Zustand. Designed a RESTful API with role-based access control, refresh-token rotation, and OpenAPI documentation.

Developed a real-time notification platform using Azure Event Hubs, SignalR, and ASP.NET Core. Applied Domain-Driven Design with bounded contexts, aggregate roots, and domain events. Implemented comprehensive integration tests using Testcontainers and WireMock for external service simulation.

Spearheaded migration to a microservices architecture using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm for container orchestration. Designed event-driven inter-service communication with Apache Kafka and implemented the saga pattern for distributed transactions. Established infrastructure-as-code practices with Terraform and Azure Bicep templates.

Developed a data-ingestion pipeline using Apache Kafka, Azure Data Factory, and Databricks Spark Streaming. Implemented idempotent Kafka consumers with dead-letter queuing and exactly-once delivery semantics. Implemented CI/CD platform using GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and Terraform. Built reusable GitHub Actions composite action templates adopted across 8 engineering teams. Configured Kubernetes namespaces, resource quotas, horizontal pod autoscalers, and network policies for multi-tenant environment isolation.

Owned a PCI-DSS-compliant payment-gateway integration using asymmetric encryption, HSM-backed key management, and audit logging to Elasticsearch. Implemented a provider-agnostic payment abstraction layer supporting Stripe, PayPal, and Adyen. Built idempotent retry logic with exponential backoff and circuit breaker patterns using Polly.

Optimised SQL Server database by redesigning covering indexes, filtered indexes, and table partitioning strategies using execution plan analysis. Resolved N+1 query patterns using Dapper projections and batch loading via EF Core split queries. Implemented read replicas with automatic failover using SQL Server Always On Availability Groups.

Built a developer platform using a Next.js frontend and ASP.NET Core backend with a Terraform-powered provisioning engine. Integrated Azure Active Directory for SSO and fine-grained RBAC using Microsoft.Identity.Web. Implemented approval workflows with Azure Service Bus and a state-machine engine built on the Stateless.NET library.
